sme_leads.notes: No website presence found — entirely reliant on word of mouth and footfall. A simple site with gallery and quote form would capture local search traffic for 'carpet fitters Southampton'.
Has a basic site built around 2019 — no mobile optimisation, no online booking, and no price list visible. Fresha competitors in the same postcode are capturing appointment bookings they're missing.
Listed on Just Eat and Deliveroo but has no owned website. Building a direct ordering page would reduce platform commission costs and give them a Google presence for 'Indian takeaway Portswood'.
Website exists but loads slowly on mobile and has no booking integration — enquiries go via a generic contact form. Competitors using Cliniko or a booking widget are converting better on mobile.
Google Maps listing only — no website, no reviews beyond a handful. A one-page site with MOT booking, pricing, and a review funnel would dominate local search for 'MOT Totton' quickly.

linkedin_prospects.name: Mark Hendley
linkedin_prospects.title: Head of Sales
linkedin_prospects.reason: Manages a team of 6–10 negotiators across multiple Hampshire branches. Estate agency sales teams have high turnover and inconsistent objection handling — CloseCoach's roleplay module maps directly to the viewings-to-offer conversion gap he'd be measured on.

linkedin_prospects.reason: Leads a team of commercial finance brokers and recently posted about onboarding two new consultants. New-hire ramp time is the exact pain CloseCoach addresses — her post signals she's actively thinking about sales enablement.

CloseCoach objection-handling training around finance packages and part-exchange conversations is a direct fit for his team's biggest conversion leaks.

dts.title: DVSA just cancelled 40,000 tests — here's how to get one in 2 weeks
dts.format: Talking-head hook (5s urgency stat) → screen-record of DTS swap flow → CTA overlay; keep it under 45 seconds.

dts.title: POV: you swapped your test date and passed 6 weeks earlier than planned
dts.format: UGC-style reaction video using a real user success story as text overlay with celebratory audio; encourage comments tagging someone who needs a test date.

athletics.title: The 3-drill sprint warm-up that changed my acceleration off the blocks
athletics.format: Wide-angle gym or track footage, split into 3 short clips with text labels per drill; voiceover explaining each cue; no music keeps it educational.

athletics.title: Why most people never get faster (it's not effort)
athletics.format: Talking-head monologue on the difference between speed work and fitness — contrarian hook, ends with 'save this if you train' CTA to drive algorithm saves.

aimybiz.title: I put a sales rep through 5 common objections using AI — here's what happened
aimybiz.format: Screen-record of a CloseCoach session with commentary overlay; show the rep improving across 3 rounds; end with before/after score card as a native video or carousel.

aimybiz.title: Your newest sales hire will quit within 90 days if you don't do this one thing
aimybiz.format: Hook-first text post about ramp time and early confidence; weave in the AI roleplay angle in paragraph 3; CTA is a DM or comment 'COACH' to get a demo link.
